name: Assurant, Inc.
description: Assurant, Inc. is a leading global business services company that supports, protects, and connects major consumer purchases. A Fortune 500 company, Assurant partners with prominent brands to deliver mobile device protection, extended service contracts, vehicle protection services, renters insurance, lender-placed insurance, and other specialty risk solutions. Operating in multiple countries across North America, Latin America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific, the company focuses on enhancing customer experience and providing risk management solutions in the connected home, lifestyle, and automotive markets.
